transcript_spans.text: Through the years it'll grow From the roots to the branches Little star you will glow As you reach beyond the sky and sea Inspiring other dreams to be Take a step, take my hand Who knows where we'll land
And close your eyes Just count to three And come real

Find your wish, that's the start Turn your eyes up to the stars It's a treasure trove of dreamers to discover Then find the place in your dream where a spark becomes a gleam Shine your light, you've gotta share it with each other
